proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +36.3pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Portfolio UP_TRI exposure is 57/62 (91.9%) — if regime flips to Bear, this cohort would activate on top of an already UP_TRI-heavy book; monitor regime_watch for transitions
R-multiple 0.61 reflects D-8 Day-6 forced-exit dominance; underlying edge may compress if exit policy changes
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +36.3pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +36.3pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 82.26% Choppy exposure across 62 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-29) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type = Choppy regime (82.26%) + UP_TRI signal (91.94%) (91.9%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type = Choppy regime (82.26%) + UP_TRI signal (91.94%); recommended action: Pause new UP_TRI entries in Choppy regime until either (a) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes to Tier M, or (b) regime concentration drops below 0.80 via natural Day-6 exits. If a Bear-confirming bridge prints, consider hedging the long book with index puts or a DOWN_TRI overlay rather than mass-exiting.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 59-position long book (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY) simultaneously with no statistical justification — all supporting cohorts are Candidate tier, so there is no validated edge backing the directional exposure.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy at 0.8226 vs 0.80 threshold (51/62 open positions)
UP_TRI signal share at 57/62 = 91.94%, above the 0.85 single-signal threshold
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort tier = Candidate (n=144) — unvalidated edge
UP_TRI×Choppy×FMCG cell at 14.52% (below 20% cell threshold but largest cluster)
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new UP_TRI entries in Choppy regime until either (a) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes to Tier M, or (b) regime concentration drops below 0.80 via natural Day-6 exits. If a Bear-confirming bridge prints, consider hedging the long book with index puts or a DOWN_TRI overlay rather than mass-exiting.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 59-position long book (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY) simultaneously with no statistical justification — all supporting cohorts are Candidate tier, so there is no validated edge backing the directional exposure.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration is triggered at 0.8226 (Choppy, above the 0.80 threshold) and the matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=144) — unvalidated edge. UP_TRI also dominates the signal mix at 57/62 = 91.9% (above the 0.85 threshold), and the book is overwhelmingly directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY = 59/62 = 95.2%), so a Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the long-heavy book simultaneously with no statistical justification.
